stemHtml: ATC issues: "JETAIR 136 CLEARED TO BURY, VIA E40 FL280 BOLDEN 3 DELTA DEPARTURE, SQUAWK 5501". What is the proper readback?

options.a: CLEARED TO BURY, VIA E40 FL280 BOLDEN 3 DELTA DEPARTURE, SQUAWK 5501 JETAIR 136.
options.b: VIA E40 FL280 BOLDEN 3 DELTA DEPARTURE, SQUAWK 5501 JETAIR 136.
options.c: CLEARED TO BURY, VIA ROUTE E40 FL280 BOLDEN 3DELTA STANDARD DEPARTURE JETAIR 136.
